ZeroFreeRegion.name: classical_zero_free_region
ZeroFreeRegion.shape: ∃ c > 0, ∀ s : ℂ, |s.im| ≥ 2 → s.re ≥ 1 - c / Real.log |s.im| → riemannZeta s ≠ 0

ZeroFreeRegion.name: vinogradov_korobov_zero_free_region
ZeroFreeRegion.shape: ∃ c > 0, ∀ s : ℂ, |s.im| ≥ 3 → s.re ≥ 1 - c / (Real.log |s.im|)^(2/3 : ℝ) * (Real.log (Real.log |s.im|))^(-1/3 : ℝ) → riemannZeta s ≠ 0

HardyTheorem.name: integral_asymptotic_target
HardyTheorem.shape: ∀ n ≥ 1, ∃ A > 0, (fun T => weightedIntegral n T) ~[atTop] (fun T => ((-1 : ℝ)^n * A) * T ^ ((2 * n : ℝ) + 1 / 4))

HardyTheorem.name: hardy_two_signed_moments_target
HardyTheorem.shape: A_1 > 0 and A_2 > 0 asymptotic constants for n=1 and n=2 signed weighted moments

HardyTheorem.name: weightedIntegralOf_tail_dominates
HardyTheorem.shape: ∃ A, Tendsto (fun T => ∫ t in A..T, weightFunction n t * f t) atTop atTop
depends_on: tail-integral divergence control for the critical integrands

HardyTheorem.name: hardy_zeros_unbounded_target
HardyTheorem.shape: ∀ T : ℝ, ∃ t : ℝ, T ≤ t ∧ riemannZeta (1/2 + I * t) = 0

HardyTheorem.name: hardy_zeros_abs_unbounded_target
HardyTheorem.shape: ∀ T : ℝ, ∃ t : ℝ, T ≤ |t| ∧ riemannZeta (1/2 + I * t) = 0

HardyTheorem.name: hardy_littlewood_lower_bound_target
HardyTheorem.shape: ∃ C > 0, ∃ T0 : ℝ, ∀ T ≥ T0, (zeroCountOnCriticalLine T : ℝ) ≥ C * T

HardyTheorem.name: selberg_zero_proportion_target
HardyTheorem.shape: ∃ c > 0, ∃ T0 : ℝ, ∀ T ≥ T0, (zeroCountOnCriticalLine T : ℝ) ≥ c * (T / (2*π) * Real.log T)

HardyTheorem.name: gamma_asymptotic_half_plus_it_target
HardyTheorem.shape: (Gamma(1/2 + I t)) has classical Stirling-type asymptotic on the critical line

HardyTheorem.name: theta_asymptotic_target
HardyTheorem.shape: exists unwrapped θ(t) with θ(t) ~ t/2*log(t/(2π)) - t/2 - π/8

HardyTheorem.name: approximate_functional_equation_target
HardyTheorem.shape: Dirichlet-type two-piece approximation for ζ(1/2+it) with power saving remainder

PrimeNumberTheorem.name: explicit_formula_von_mangoldt
PrimeNumberTheorem.shape: Tendsto (explicitFormulaApprox x T) atTop (𝓝 (chebyshevPsi0 x : ℂ))

RiemannExplorer.name: conrey_40_percent_zeros_on_critical_line_target
RiemannExplorer.shape: ∃ c>0, ∃ T0, ∀T≥T0, zeroCountOnCriticalLine T ≥ c * T / (2π) * log T

chain_summary.name: Quantitative zero-free region
chain_summary.next_step: supply high-height zero-free/derivative estimates and keep compact patching lemmas already formalized

chain_summary.name: Explicit formula
chain_summary.next_step: finish Perron-to-residue finite-height chain, then pass from contour sum to truncated/ψ0 limit

chain_summary.name: RH error equivalence
chain_summary.next_step: bridge explicit formula through RH-scale psi/theta error and convert to prime-counting Li error

chain_summary.name: Hardy theorem
chain_summary.next_step: prove Hardy signed moment asymptotics and tail-dominance then derive unbounded zeros
